narrative:
Crestline 1A (precinct in Crawford County) has 758 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
